articles.author: Carlos Catire, Jesse Kirsch, Minyvonne Burke
articles.title: Husband of missing American woman in the Bahamas leaves country, lawyer says - NBC News
articles.description: The husband of an American woman who was reportedly swept out to sea in the Bahamas has left the country, his lawyer told NBC News.
articles.content:
The husband of an American woman who was reportedly swept out to sea in the Bahamas has left the country, his lawyer told NBC News.
